title: Useless Mod
description: A (absolutely not) useless mod for Minecraft
body:
Useless Mod is a mod developed for NeoForge
Versions before Minecraft 1.20.2 were developed for Minecraft Forge
This mod adds some useless and useful stuff to the game.

Requires TheMCBrosLib !

 

  • There are two new materials: Useless & Super-Useless
  • Useless Weapons, Tools and Armor
  • Useless Shields
  • Useless Elytras
  • Useless Forest biome with useless flowers and useless oak wood
  • Useless Animals (Sheep, Pig, Chicken, Cow)
  • Useless Skeleton
  • Wall Closet within all wood variants
  • Coffee Seeds / Coffee Beans / Coffee Machine
  • Paint Bucket, Paint Brush, Painted Wool, Paint
  • Useless Rails (faster than normal ones)
  • Some Decoration Blocks

 

MC 1.21 / MC 1.20.6 / MC 1.20.4
  • The Wall Closet is compatible with any mod that adds planks
  • The Useless Wrench may be compatible with other mods.
  • Just Enough Items - Coffee Machine & Item Subtypes
  • Other compatibilities are unknown
MC 1.20.2
  • The Wall Closet is compatible with any mod that adds planks
  • The Useless Wrench may be compatible with other mods.
  • There is no JEI Plugin for this version!
  • Other compatibilities are unknown
MC 1.20.1 / MC 1.19.2 / MC 1.18.2
  • The Wall Closet is compatible with any mod that adds planks
  • The Useless Wrench may be compatible with other mods.
  • Just Enough Items - Coffee Machine & Item Subtypes
  • Other compatibilities are unknown
MC 1.16.5
  • The Wall Closet is compatible with any mod that adds planks
  • The Useless Wrench is compatible with Mekanism and RFTools. Other compatibilities are unknown.
  • Just Enough Items - Coffee Machine & Item Subtypes
  • Mystical Agriculture - Seeds + Essence for materials and animals
  • Silent Gear - Tool materials
  • Mekanism - Processing recipes for metals
  • Immersive Engineering - Many recipes (Crusher, Arc Furnace, Metalpress, etc.)
  • Create - Recipes for crushing wheel, etc.
  • Thermal Expansion has some recipes for useless stuff

 

Minecraft Loader Status
1.21 NeoForge ✅ Active Development
1.20.6 ✅ Bug Fixes, but no new features
1.20.5 ❌ not planned
1.20.4 ✅ Bug Fixes, but no new features
1.20.3 ❌ not planned
1.20.2 ❌ No future updates planned!
1.20.1 Forge ✅ Bug Fixes, but no new features
1.19.3 / 1.19.4 ❌ not planned
1.19.2 and older ❌ End of Support
Fabric ❌ Outdated and not supported!

 

  • Find the game installation folder
  • Put the mod .jar file into the mods folder
  • If you run a server, also just put it in the server mods folder.

 

  • Please feel free to use this mod in your modpack.

 

This description always only refers to the latest version of the mod
